recommendations.title: Halo Legends
recommendations.overview: The universe of the Halo video game series is expanded in seven short animated films from Japan's greatest anime directors and studios.
recommendations.director: Shinji Aramaki, Tomoki Kyoda, Koji Sawai, Koichi Mashimo, Keiichi Sugiyama, Hiroshi Yamazaki, Takahiro Tanaka, Toshiyuki Kanno, Megumi Shimizu, Mamoru Oshii, Hiroyuki Kawasaki, Daisuke Nishio, Yasushi Muraki, Hideki Futamura

recommendations.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death and Rebirth
recommendations.overview: Originally a collection of clips from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, Death was created as a precursor to the re-worked ending of the series. Rebirth was intended as that re-worked ending, but after production overruns Rebirth became only the
recommendations.director: Hiroyuki Ishido, Masahiko Otsuka, Tetsuya Watanabe, Akira Takamura, Seiji Mizushima, Naoyasu Habu, Tensai Okamura, Ken Ando, Tsuyoshi Kaga, Shoichi Masuo, Hideaki Anno, Minoru Ohara, Masayuki, Kazuya Tsurumaki, Keiichi Sugiyama

recommendations.title: EVANGELION: DEATH (TRUE)²
recommendations.overview: A highly experimental film presenting a story out of chronological order taking place 15 years after a near-apocalyptic catastrophe, about four traumatized 14 year olds who are tasked with piloting massive humanoid decisive weapons called Evangelion,
recommendations.director: Kazuya Tsurumaki, Seiji Mizushima, Naoyasu Habu, Hiroyuki Ishido, Akira Takamura, Tensai Okamura, Hideaki Anno, Masayuki, Tetsuya Watanabe, Tsuyoshi Kaga, Ken Ando, Keiichi Sugiyama, Minoru Ohara, Masahiko Otsuka, Shoichi Masuo

recommendations.title: Children of Men
recommendations.overview: In 2027, in a chaotic world in which humans can no longer procreate, a former activist agrees to help transport a miraculously pregnant woman to a sanctuary at sea, where her child's birth may help scientists save the future of humankind.

recommendations.title: All Dogs Go to Heaven 2
recommendations.overview: Charlie and Itchy return to Earth to find Gabriel's Horn, but along the way meet up with a young boy named David, who ran away from home.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
recommendations.overview: In a brutal war between devils, hunters, and secret enemies, a mysterious girl named Reze has stepped into Denji's world, and he faces his deadliest battle yet, fueled by love in a world where survival knows no rules.

recommendations.title: Away
recommendations.overview: After suffering a plane crash on a mysterious island, a young man embarks on an epic journey through forests, deserts and mountains trying to escape the shadow of a huge dark spirit.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.
